driver_insight: Patna City Old Town's human apparent temperature of 48.9°C is primarily driven by high building density (NDBI 0.69), low vegetation cover (NDVI 0.04), low-albedo surface materials (albedo 0.09), extreme ambient temperature (43.4°C). Based on our dual AIML modeling, the city's heat dynamics are captured with high accuracy (Linear R² = 1.0, Random Forest R² = 0.979). In this city, every 0.1 increase in NDVI is associated with a 1.81°C change in LST.
